prompt: Create a clean 2D game character parts sheet for Spine 4.3 cutout rigging. Include separated opaque parts: head, hair front, hair back, torso, pelvis, upper arms, forearms, hands, thighs, calves, feet, shoulder armor, belt, cape upper, cape lower, sword, shield. Orthographic sprite sheet layout, generous spacing, no overlaps, no cropped edges. Polished hand-painted fantasy game art, readable silhouettes, slight outline. Perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, no shadows, no gradient, no texture, no text, no labels, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 in the subject.

Perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, no cast shadows, no labels, no text, no watermark. Avoid #00ff00 in the subject.

Perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, no shadows, no labels, no text, no watermark. Avoid #00ff00 in the subject.
